task: Create the folder src/middleware if it does not exist, then create src/middleware/fortress.js that exports: (1) an Express middleware function setting the security headers (and HSTS if FORTRESS_HSTS=true), (2) a Koa middleware (async (ctx, next)) setting the same headers, and (3) an Express Router exported as router with GET /status/fo returning 200 JSON { status: "ok", fortress: true }, using CommonJS. Do not modify other files yet.
